# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover engaging math games kids actually enjoy playing! MathScholars offers free interactive games that make learning math fun and effortless. Start playing today!

### About & Ethics
https://example.com/about
Learn how MathScholars transforms math education through ethical, research-backed game design. We&#39;re committed to building confident young mathematicians worldwide.

### How It Works
https://example.com/how-it-works
See how our free math games adapt to your child&#39;s skill level, track progress, and build confidence. Simple setup gets kids learning math in minutes!

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Questions about our math games for kids? Need technical help or want to share your success story? Our team is here to help you every step of the way.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
